title: A Resolution authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños through the Local Chief Executive, Honorable Mayor Neil Andrew N. Nocon to enter into and sign a Tripartite Memorandum of Agreement (MOA) with the Sangguniang Barangay of Mayondon and University of the Philippines (UPLB) for the implementation of the Barangay Integrated Development Approach for Nutrition Improvement (BIDANI)
